fear: That something will happen that the white press can use to characterize the students as provocateurs, and that his account will be dismissed as partisan
name: James Caldwell
role: Reporter, Carolina Peacemaker (Greensboro's Black-owned weekly newspaper)
voice: Precise, economical, the voice of a man who has learned that every word he writes will be read against him by someone looking for a reason to dismiss it
secrets: He was at the Woolworth's counter himself as a child and was refused service — he has never written about this and does not intend to
He has already sent a preliminary note to the AP stringer that the action is 'proceeding without incident' — a characterization he will have to retract if anything goes wrong
knowledge: He was tipped off about today's action by a contact at A&T College two days ago and has been here since 4:15 PM
He has already written the first three paragraphs of his story in his head and they depend entirely on the students maintaining their discipline through closing
He knows that the Associated Press stringer in Greensboro has been contacted and may arrive before 5:30 PM
publicFace: A lean man in his early thirties in a pressed gray suit, carrying a reporter's notepad in his breast pocket and moving through the store with the practiced invisibility of a Black professional in a white commercial space
represents: REQUIRES FACT-CHECK — verify whether this is a documented historical individual from the Greensboro sit-in, February 1960
trustLogic: He opens to anyone who gives him a direct, on-the-record account; he is professionally skeptical of anyone whose account is too convenient
privateGoal: Get the story — the full, accurate, unambiguous story — and get it to the wire before the white dailies can frame it first

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Identifies himself by name and publication and asks a single, precise question
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not spike the story regardless of who asks him to
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Produces his press card and states that he is there in a professional capacity and that anything said to him may be published
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: States his name, his publication, and that he is covering a matter of public interest
